expected_max_age_note: Snapshot has no inherent expiry. Reader compares written_at_utc to current time and applies own threshold per CLAUDE.md State Reporting Protocol.
last_completed_step: Mounted nemoclaw/obsidian into n8n container at /files/obsidian; verified writable as uid=1000; commit afecb5d pushed; PR #9 updated.
waiting_for: Human to (1) open http://127.0.0.1:5678/, (2) build/import a manual workflow that writes to /files/obsidian/test.md, (3) execute it, (4) confirm whether nemoclaw/obsidian/test.md appeared on the host.
next_expected_event: Human reports either 'test.md appeared' (success path) or pastes the n8n execution-log error (failure path).

deferred.reason: Docker pull blocked by sandbox proxy — CloudFront 403 on multi-hundred-MB blobs; 10/10 attempts failed.
deferred.remediation: retry pull when proxy is healthier or whitelist a registry mirror

substrate_check_at_turn_end.reason: Docker daemon socket unreachable at turn-end probe. Sandbox lacks an init system; daemon was started manually earlier and may have been reaped between turns. This is sandbox-environmental, not a NemoClaw substrate failure.
substrate_check_at_turn_end.interpretation: Use last_known_good_state with skepticism. Confirm with `docker ps` before relying on it.
